{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The critique mentions one prior work (Lin et al., 2022) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to other relevant works in verbalized confidence or uncertainty calibration.",
    "R1.7": "The critique flags a potential citation error regarding Halabi et al. and lacks specific details about missing citations.",
    "RX.1": "The critique presents all claims as factual without acknowledging any uncertainty in the assessment of the cited work's existence or the accuracy of the model's performance.",
    "RX.3": "The critique focuses on the scope of the evaluation, highlighting missing information about coverage and comparison to radiologists.",
    "RX.4": "The critique does not identify any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in the original paragraph.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks specific annotations regarding the source and reason for each non-cosmetic change made to the original paragraph."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The critique mentions one prior work (Lin et al., 2022) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to other relevant works in verbalized confidence or uncertainty calibration.
rationale.R1.7: The critique flags a potential citation error regarding Halabi et al. and lacks specific details about missing citations.
rationale.RX.1: The critique presents all claims as factual without acknowledging any uncertainty in the assessment of the cited work's existence or the accuracy of the model's performance.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on the scope of the evaluation, highlighting missing information about coverage and comparison to radiologists.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not identify any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in the original paragraph.
rationale.RX.5: The critique lacks specific annotations regarding the source and reason for each non-cosmetic change made to the original paragraph.
